global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the BingeLayer app for new content.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A central rectangular area with a lighter shade of purple, featuring additional elements layered on top.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'A new season drops' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'New hits every week', providing additional context.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Install now' in white, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, featuring the text 'BingeLayer' in a simple font.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes in the main content area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: An unspecified element that may serve a decorative or functional purpose within the layout.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: Another unspecified element that contributes to the overall design but lacks clear identification.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: A small, unspecified element that may enhance the visual composition of the ad.

elements.label: Small element
elements.description: A very small element located at the bottom center, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad reiterating the main message with a call to action.
elements.text_content: new season drops Ne Install now

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo appears at the top left, reinforcing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, BingeLayer logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with the CTA button at the bottom center.
